prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985、211、双一流；校本部（哈尔滨工业大学）软科主榜 2026 年约第 12 名，近年排名稳中有升；深圳校区共享校本部品牌与学科资源，办学层次极高；2026 年声誉评价中性/混合，无明显负面事件；抖音热度中哈工大（含深圳）综合排名第 10，评价为高热，短视频曝光量大，反映报考关注度持续升温；共享哈工大 A+ 学科：力学、机械工程、材料科学与工程、环境科学与工程；A 学科：计算机科学与技术、控制科学与工程、电气工程、数学等；深圳校区招生专业覆盖计算机、通信、自动化、材料、土木、环境等优势方向。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等工科专业 2026 年持续高热推荐；本省 2026 年普通高考总人数约 16.7 万，较 2025 年总考生（约 17.2 万）减少约 3%，物理类考生相应减少约 3.3%，竞争略有缓解；深圳校区位于一线城市，地域吸引力强，对高分考生有显著虹吸效应；该校在黑龙江招生占比不高，属跨省招生，地域偏好对位次影响有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2025 年基准位次 1650 名、2026 年计划大幅扩招 150%（从 14 人增至 35 人）导致竞争加剧、本省物理类考生减少约 3.3% 部分缓解竞争、学校高声誉与高热度的持续吸引力，预计 2026 年最低位次约 3105 名，区间 2732–3478 名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 工科试验班（未来信息）（计算机科学与技术、通信工程）
- 工科试验班（自主智能）（人工智能、机器人工程、自动化）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 工科试验班（未来能源卓越联培班）（材料科学与工程、能源与动力工程、工程力学）
- 数学与应用数学（卓越联培班）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 工科试验班（未来城市卓越联培班）（土木工程、环境工程、建筑学、城乡规划、化学）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间 2732–3478 名内，建议以二档为主力、一档冲刺、三档保底；位次明显优于区间下限（<2732 名）可重点冲击一档未来信息或自主智能专业；位次接近区间上限（>3478 名）建议以三档保底为主。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for science/physics category was approximately 1576→869→1596→1481→1650, fluctuating around 1500 overall, with a baseline of about 1650 in 2025; a slight backward trend over the past 3 years, shifting about 169 places backward in 2025 compared to 2024; provincial science/physics enrollment plan: 40 in 2021, 40 in 2022, 27 in 2023, 28 in 2024, 14 in 2025; 2026 plan is 35, a significant expansion of about 150% compared to 2025, intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; main campus (Harbin Institute of Technology) ranked approximately 12th in the 2026 Soft Science main ranking, with stable or rising rankings in recent years; Shenzhen campus shares the brand and academic resources of the main campus, with an extremely high level of operation; 2026 reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, with no significant negative events; on Douyin, HIT (including Shenzhen) ranks 10th overall in popularity, rated as high heat, with large short video exposure, reflecting continuously increasing attention for applications; shares HIT's A+ disciplines: Mechanics, Mechanical Engineering, Materials Science and Engineering, Environmental Science and Engineering; A disciplines: Computer Science and Technology, Control Science and Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Mathematics, etc.; Shenzhen campus offers majors covering advantageous directions such as Computer Science, Communication, Automation, Materials, Civil Engineering, Environmental Engineering.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering continue to be highly recommended in 2026; the total number of regular college entrance exam takers in the province in 2026 is about 167,000, a decrease of about 3% from 2025 (about 172,000), with physics category takers decreasing by about 3.3%, slightly easing competition; Shenzhen campus is located in a first-tier city, with strong regional appeal, exerting a significant siphon effect on high-scoring students; the university's enrollment proportion in Heilongjiang is not high, belonging to cross-provincial enrollment, with limited impact of regional preference on rankings.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Combining the 2025 baseline ranking of 1650, a significant 150% expansion in the 2026 plan (from 14 to 35) leading to intensified competition, a provincial physics category candidate decrease of about 3.3% partially easing competition, and the sustained appeal of high reputation and popularity, the estimated 2026 minimum ranking is about 3105, with a range of 2732–3478.

- Engineering Experimental Class (Autonomous Intelligence) (Artificial Intelligence, Robotics Engineering, Automation).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 2732–3478, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 as the main target, with Tier 1 as a reach and Tier 3 as a safety; if your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<2732), you can focus on reaching for Tier 1 Future Information or Autonomous Intelligence majors; if your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (>3478), it is recommended to mainly use Tier 3 as a safety.
